tEn: Search-R1: Training LLMs to Reason and Leverage Search Engines with Reinforcement Learning
tZh: Search-R1：通过强化学习训练大语言模型进行推理并利用搜索引擎
sEn: Search-R1 trains LLMs to autonomously generate search queries during reasoning, improving performance by 41% on 7B models.
sZh: Search-R1 通过强化学习让大语言模型在推理过程中自主生成搜索查询，在7B模型上性能提升41%。
absEn: Efficiently acquiring external knowledge and up-to-date information is essential for effective reasoning and text generation in large language models (LLMs). Prompting advanced LLMs with reasoning capabilities to use search engines during inference is often suboptimal, as the LLM might not fully possess the capability on how to interact optimally with the search engine. This paper introduces Search-R1, an extension of reinforcement learning (RL) for reasoning frameworks where the LLM learns to autonomously generate (multiple) search queries during step-by-step reasoning with real-time retrieval. Search-R1 optimizes LLM reasoning trajectories with multi-turn search interactions, leveraging retrieved token masking for stable RL training and a simple outcome-based reward function. Experiments on seven question-answering datasets show that Search-R1 improves performance by 41% (Qwen2.5-7B) and 20% (Qwen2.5-3B) over various RAG baselines under the same setting. This paper further provides empirical insights into RL optimization methods, LLM choices, and response length dynamics in retrieval-augmented reasoning. The code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/PeterGriffinJin/Search-R1.
absZh: 高效获取外部知识和最新信息对于大语言模型（LLM）的有效推理和文本生成至关重要。在推理过程中提示具有推理能力的高级LLM使用搜索引擎往往不是最优的，因为LLM可能不完全具备如何与搜索引擎最佳交互的能力。本文介绍了Search-R1，这是强化学习（RL）在推理框架中的一种扩展，其中LLM学会在逐步推理过程中自主生成（多个）搜索查询并进行实时检索。Search-R1通过多轮搜索交互优化LLM推理轨迹，利用检索到的令牌掩码进行稳定的RL训练，并采用简单的基于结果的奖励函数。在七个问答数据集上的实验表明，在相同设置下，Search-R1相比各种RAG基线，在Qwen2.5-7B上性能提升41%，在Qwen2.5-3B上提升20%。本文还进一步提供了关于RL优化方法、LLM选择以及检索增强推理中响应长度动态的实证见解。代码和模型检查点可在https://github.com/PeterGriffinJin/Search-R1获取。

contrib.en: Identifies challenges of applying RL to LLM reasoning with search engine calling.
contrib.zh: 识别了将强化学习应用于大语言模型推理与搜索引擎调用中的挑战。

contrib.en: Proposes Search-R1, a novel RL framework supporting interleaved reasoning and search with token masking for stable training.
contrib.zh: 提出了Search-R1，一种新颖的强化学习框架，支持推理与搜索交错进行，并通过词元掩码实现稳定训练。

contrib.en: Achieves 26%, 21%, and 10% average relative improvement over strong baselines on seven QA datasets.
contrib.zh: 在七个问答数据集上，相对于强基线分别实现了26%、21%和10%的平均相对提升。

contrib.en: Provides empirical insights on RL methods, LLM choices, and response length dynamics in retrieval-augmented reasoning.
contrib.zh: 提供了关于检索增强推理中强化学习方法、大语言模型选择及响应长度动态的实证见解。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effectiveness across base and instruction-tuned models, and different model families.
contrib.zh: 展示了在基础模型和指令微调模型以及不同模型系列上的有效性。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to seven QA datasets; generalizability to other tasks not verified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于七个问答数据集，未验证对其他任务的泛化性。

limits.en: Relies on a single retriever (E5) and Wikipedia corpus; performance may vary with other sources.
limits.zh: 依赖单一检索器（E5）和维基百科语料库，使用其他来源时性能可能不同。

limits.en: Uses simple outcome-based reward; more sophisticated rewards could further improve performance.
limits.zh: 使用简单的基于结果的奖励，更复杂的奖励可能进一步提升性能。

limits.en: Training requires significant computational resources for RL with search interactions.
limits.zh: 训练需要大量计算资源以支持带搜索交互的强化学习。

limits.en: Search-R1 may not handle tasks requiring dynamic retrieval adjustments based on uncertainty.
limits.zh: Search-R1可能无法处理需要基于不确定性进行动态检索调整的任务。

items.en: Efficiently acquiring external knowledge and up-to-date information is essential for effective reasoning and text generation in large language models (LLMs). Prompting advanced LLMs with reasoning capabilities during inference to use search engines is not optimal, since the LLM does not learn how to interact optimally with the search engine. This paper introduces Search-R1, an extension of the DeepSeek-R1 model where the LLM learns—solely through reinforcement learning (RL)—to autonomously generate (multiple) search queries during step-by-step reasoning with real-time retrieval. Search-R1 optimizes LLM rollouts with multi-turn search interactions, leveraging retrieved token masking for stable RL training and a simple outcome-based reward function. Experiments on seven question-answering datasets show that Search-R1 improves performance by 26% (Qwen2.5-7B), 21% (Qwen2.5-3B), and 10% (LLaMA3.2-3B) over strong baselines. This paper further provides empirical insights into RL optimization methods, LLM choices, and response length dynamics in retrieval-augmented reasoning. The code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/PeterGriffinJin/Search-R1.
items.zh: 高效获取外部知识和最新信息对于大型语言模型（LLM）进行有效推理和文本生成至关重要。在推理过程中提示具有推理能力的高级LLM使用搜索引擎并非最优，因为LLM并未学会如何与搜索引擎进行最优交互。本文介绍了Search-R1，它是DeepSeek-R1模型的扩展，其中LLM仅通过强化学习（RL）学会在逐步推理过程中自主生成（多个）搜索查询并进行实时检索。Search-R1通过多轮搜索交互优化LLM的rollout，利用检索令牌掩码实现稳定的RL训练，并采用简单的基于结果的奖励函数。在七个问答数据集上的实验表明，与强基线相比，Search-R1在Qwen2.5-7B上提升了26%，在Qwen2.5-3B上提升了21%，在LLaMA3.2-3B上提升了10%。本文还进一步提供了关于RL优化方法、LLM选择以及检索增强推理中响应长度动态的实证见解。代码和模型检查点可在https://github.com/PeterGriffinJin/Search-R1获取。

items.en: In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in natural language understanding and generation (Hendrycks et al., 2020; Clark et al., 2018). Despite these achievements, LLMs often encounter challenges when tasked with complex reasoning (Wei et al., 2022) and retrieving up-to-date information from external sources (Jin et al., 2024). Addressing these limitations necessitates integrating advanced reasoning abilities (Huang & Chang, 2022) and the capability to interact effectively with search engines (Schick et al., 2023).
items.zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）在自然语言理解和生成方面展现了卓越的能力（Hendrycks等人，2020；Clark等人，2018）。尽管取得了这些成就，LLM在复杂推理（Wei等人，2022）和从外部来源检索最新信息（Jin等人，2024）时常常遇到挑战。解决这些限制需要整合高级推理能力（Huang & Chang, 2022）以及与搜索引擎有效交互的能力（Schick等人，2023）。

items.en: Existing approaches for integrating LLMs with search engines typically fall into two categories: (1) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) (Gao et al., 2023; Lewis et al., 2020) and (2) treating the search engine as a tool (Yao et al., 2023; Schick et al., 2023). RAG retrieves relevant passages based on the input query and incorporates them into the LLM’s context for generation (Lewis et al., 2020). This allows the LLM to leverage external knowledge when answering questions. However, RAG is constrained by retrieval inaccuracy (Jin et al., 2024) and multi-hop retrieval capability (Yang et al., 2018). While existing works (Trivedi et al., 2022a) propose to conduct prompting for multi-turn, multi-query retrieval, it is not optimal, since the LLM does not learn how to interact with the search engine during training. Alternatively, LLMs can be prompted or trained to utilize tools, including search engines, as part of their reasoning process (Qu et al., 2025; Trivedi et al., 2022a). However, prompting-based approaches often struggle with generalization, as certain tasks may not have been encountered during LLM pretraining. On the other hand, training-based approaches provide greater adaptability but rely on large-scale, high-quality annotated trajectories of search-and-reasoning interactions, making them difficult to scale effectively (Schick et al., 2023).
items.zh: 现有的将LLM与搜索引擎集成的方法通常分为两类：（1）检索增强生成（RAG）（Gao等人，2023；Lewis等人，2020）和（2）将搜索引擎视为工具（Yao等人，2023；Schick等人，2023）。RAG根据输入查询检索相关段落，并将其纳入LLM的上下文以进行生成（Lewis等人，2020）。这使得LLM在回答问题时能够利用外部知识。然而，RAG受到检索不准确（Jin等人，2024）和多跳检索能力（Yang等人，2018）的限制。虽然现有工作（Trivedi等人，2022a）提出通过提示进行多轮、多查询检索，但这并非最优，因为LLM在训练过程中并未学会如何与搜索引擎交互。或者，LLM可以被提示或训练以利用工具（包括搜索引擎）作为其推理过程的一部分（Qu等人，2025；Trivedi等人，2022a）。然而，基于提示的方法通常难以泛化，因为某些任务可能在LLM预训练期间未曾遇到。另一方面，基于训练的方法提供了更大的适应性，但依赖于大规模、高质量的搜索与推理交互标注轨迹，使其难以有效扩展（Schick等人，2023）。

items.en: Reinforcement Learning (RL) (Sutton et al., 1999; Kaelbling et al., 1996) has emerged as a potent paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of LLMs (Guo et al., 2025; Hou et al., 2025; Xie et al., 2025; Kumar et al., 2024). Notably, models like OpenAI-o1 (Jaech et al., 2024) and DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025) have leveraged RL techniques (e.g., PPO (Schulman et al., 2017) and GRPO (Shao et al., 2024)) to improve logical inference and problem-solving skills by learning from experience and feedback. After RL, even when trained solely on the outcome rewards, the models learn complex reasoning capabilities, including self-verification (Weng et al., 2022) and self-correction (Kumar et al., 2024).
items.zh: 强化学习（RL）（Sutton等人，1999；Kaelbling等人，1996）已成为增强LLM推理能力的有力范式（Guo等人，2025；Hou等人，2025；Xie等人，2025；Kumar等人，2024）。值得注意的是，像OpenAI-o1（Jaech等人，2024）和DeepSeek-R1（Guo等人，2025）这样的模型利用RL技术（例如PPO（Schulman等人，2017）和GRPO（Shao等人，2024））通过从经验和反馈中学习来改进逻辑推理和问题解决能力。经过RL训练后，即使仅基于结果奖励进行训练，模型也能学习复杂的推理能力，包括自我验证（Weng等人，2022）和自我纠正（Kumar等人，2024）。

items.en: However, applying reinforcement learning (RL) to search-and-reasoning scenarios presents three key challenges: (1) RL Framework and Stability – It remains unclear how to effectively integrate the search engine into the LLM RL framework while ensuring stable optimization, particularly when incorporating retrieved context. (2) Multi-Turn Interleaved Reasoning and Search – Ideally, the LLM should be capable of iterative reasoning and search engine calls, dynamically adjusting its retrieval strategy based on the complexity of the problem. (3) Reward Design – Designing an effective reward function for search-and-reasoning tasks is nontrivial, as traditional reward formulations may not generalize well to this new paradigm.
items.zh: 然而，将强化学习（RL）应用于搜索与推理场景面临三个关键挑战：（1）RL框架与稳定性——如何有效地将搜索引擎集成到LLM RL框架中，同时确保稳定优化，特别是在纳入检索上下文时，这一点尚不明确。（2）多轮交错推理与搜索——理想情况下，LLM应能够进行迭代推理和搜索引擎调用，根据问题的复杂性动态调整其检索策略。（3）奖励设计——为搜索与推理任务设计有效的奖励函数并非易事，因为传统的奖励公式可能无法很好地泛化到这一新范式。

items.en: To address these challenges, we introduce Search-R1, a novel reinforcement learning (RL) framework that enables LLMs to interact with search engines in an interleaved manner with their own reasoning. Specifically, Search-R1 introduces the following key innovations: (1) We model the search engine as part of the environment, enabling rollout sequences that interleave LLM token generation with search engine retrievals. Search-R1 is compatible with various RL algorithms, including PPO and GRPO, and we apply retrieved token masking to ensure stable optimization. (2) Search-R1 supports multi-turn retrieval and reasoning, where search calls are explicitly triggered by <search> and </search> tokens. Retrieved content is enclosed within <information> and </information> tokens, while LLM reasoning steps are wrapped within <think> and </think> tokens. The final answer is formatted using <answer> and </answer> tokens, allowing for structured, iterative decision-making. (3) We adopt a straightforward outcome-based reward function, avoiding the complexity of process-based rewards. Our results demonstrate that this minimal reward design is effective in search-and-reasoning scenarios. Search-R1 can be viewed as an extension of DeepSeek-R1 (Guo et al., 2025), which primarily focuses on parametric reasoning by introducing search-augmented RL training for enhanced retrieval-driven decision-making.
items.zh: 为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了Search-R1，一种新颖的强化学习（RL）框架，使LLM能够以交错的方式与搜索引擎进行交互，同时进行自身推理。具体来说，Search-R1引入了以下关键创新：（1）我们将搜索引擎建模为环境的一部分，使得rollout序列能够交错进行LLM令牌生成和搜索引擎检索。Search-R1兼容多种RL算法，包括PPO和GRPO，并且我们应用检索令牌掩码以确保稳定优化。（2）Search-R1支持多轮检索和推理，其中搜索调用由<search>和</search>令牌显式触发。检索内容包含在<information>和</information>令牌内，而LLM推理步骤则包裹在<think>和</think>令牌内。最终答案使用<answer>和</answer>令牌格式化，从而实现结构化的迭代决策。（3）我们采用简单的基于结果的奖励函数，避免了基于过程的奖励的复杂性。我们的结果表明，这种最小奖励设计在搜索与推理场景中是有效的。Search-R1可以看作是DeepSeek-R1（Guo等人，2025）的扩展，后者主要通过引入搜索增强的RL训练来增强检索驱动的决策制定，专注于参数化推理。

items.en: In summary, our key contributions are threefold:
items.zh: 总之，我们的主要贡献有三点：

items.en: We identify the challenges of applying RL to LLM reasoning with search engine calling.
items.zh: 我们识别了将RL应用于LLM推理与搜索引擎调用所面临的挑战。

items.en: We propose Search-R1, a novel reinforcement learning framework that supports LLM rollout and RL optimization with a search engine, including retrieved token masking to stabilize RL training, multi-turn interleaved reasoning and search to support complex task-solving and a simple yet effective outcome reward function.
items.zh: 我们提出了Search-R1，一种新颖的强化学习框架，支持LLM rollout和与搜索引擎的RL优化，包括用于稳定RL训练的检索令牌掩码、支持复杂任务求解的多轮交错推理与搜索，以及简单而有效的基于结果的奖励函数。

items.en: We conduct systematic experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of Search-R1 with 26%, 21%, and 10% average relative improvement with three LLMs over strong baselines. In addition, we provide insights on RL for reasoning and search settings, including RL methods selection, different LLM choices and response length study.
items.zh: 我们进行了系统实验，展示了Search-R1的有效性，在三个LLM上相对于强基线分别实现了26%、21%和10%的平均相对改进。此外，我们提供了关于RL用于推理和搜索设置的见解，包括RL方法选择、不同LLM选择以及响应长度研究。

items.en: Although large language models (LLMs) (Zhao et al., 2023; Team, 2024; Achiam et al., 2023) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning (Guo et al., 2025) and coding (Guo et al., 2024) capabilities, they still lack domain-specific knowledge (Peng et al., 2023; Li et al., 2023) and are prone to hallucinations (Zhang et al., 2023). To address these limitations, search engines (Zhao et al., 2024) are widely used to provide external information. There are two primary ways to integrate search engines with LLMs: (1) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) (Gao et al., 2023) and (2) treating the search engine as a tool (Schick et al., 2023). RAG (Lewis et al., 2020; Yue et al., 2024; Xiong et al., 2025) typically follows a one-round retrieval and sequential generation pipeline, where a search engine fetches relevant information based on the input query, which is then concatenated with the query and fed into the LLM. However, this pipeline struggles with issues such as retrieving irrelevant information (Jin et al., 2024) and failing to provide sufficiently useful context (Jiang et al., 2023). An alternative approach is search-as-a-tool, where LLMs are prompted or fine-tuned to interact with the search engine. IRCoT (Trivedi et al., 2022a) and ReAct (Yao et al., 2023) use prompting to guide iterative reasoning and search engine calls, while Toolformer (Schick et al., 2023) leverages supervised fine-tuning to enhance search capabilities. However, these methods rely on high-quality labeled trajectories, which are difficult to scale. Recent work (Guo et al., 2025) suggests that reinforcement learning can enable LLMs to develop advanced reasoning skills using only outcome rewards, yet its potential in search engine calling scenarios remains under-explored.
items.zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLM）（Zhao等人，2023；Team，2024；Achiam等人，2023）展现了卓越的推理（Guo等人，2025）和编码（Guo等人，2024）能力，但它们仍然缺乏领域特定知识（Peng等人，2023；Li等人，2023），并且容易产生幻觉（Zhang等人，2023）。为了解决这些限制，搜索引擎（Zhao等人，2024）被广泛用于提供外部信息。将搜索引擎与LLM集成主要有两种方式：（1）检索增强生成（RAG）（Gao等人，2023）和（2）将搜索引擎视为工具（Schick等人，2023）。RAG（Lewis等人，2020；Yue等人，2024；Xiong等人，2025）通常遵循单轮检索和顺序生成流程，其中搜索引擎根据输入查询获取相关信息，然后将其与查询拼接并输入LLM。然而，这种流程存在检索无关信息（Jin等人，2024）和未能提供足够有用上下文（Jiang等人，2023）等问题。另一种方法是搜索即工具，其中LLM被提示或微调以与搜索引擎交互。IRCoT（Trivedi等人，2022a）和ReAct（Yao等人，2023）使用提示来引导迭代推理和搜索引擎调用，而Toolformer（Schick等人，2023）则利用监督微调来增强搜索能力。然而，这些方法依赖于高质量标注轨迹，难以扩展。最近的工作（Guo等人，2025）表明，强化学习可以使LLM仅使用结果奖励就能发展高级推理技能，但其在搜索引擎调用场景中的潜力仍有待探索。

full.sec: 2.2 Large Language Models and Reinforcement Learning
full.secZh: 2.2 大语言模型与强化学习

items.en: Reinforcement learning (RL) (Kaelbling et al., 1996) is a learning paradigm where an agent learns to make sequential decisions by interacting with an environment and receiving feedback in the form of rewards, aiming to maximize cumulative reward over time (Sutton et al., 1999). RL was introduced to LLM tuning by Ouyang et al. (2022) through reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) (Kaufmann et al., 2023). This approach first trains a reward model using human preference data (Lambert et al., 2024), which then guides RL-based tuning of the policy LLM, typically via the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. However, PPO involves multiple rounds of LLM optimization, making it challenging to implement. To simplify RL-based tuning, direct optimization methods such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) (Rafailov et al., 2023) and SimPO (Meng et al., 2024) have been proposed. While these methods offer computational efficiency, they suffer from off-policy issues (Pang et al., 2024) and do not consistently match the performance of pure RL approaches. Alternative solutions include Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024), which eliminates the need for a critic model by estimating baselines from group scores, and RLOO (Ahmadian et al., 2024), which introduces a simplified REINFORCE-style (Williams, 1992) optimization framework. Despite these advances, the application of RL to LLM-driven search engine interactions and reasoning remains largely unexplored.
items.zh: 强化学习（RL）（Kaelbling等人，1996）是一种学习范式，其中智能体通过与环境交互并接收奖励形式的反馈来学习做出顺序决策，旨在随时间最大化累积奖励（Sutton等人，1999）。RL通过基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）（Kaufmann等人，2023）被引入LLM调优（Ouyang等人，2022）。该方法首先使用人类偏好数据训练奖励模型（Lambert等人，2024），然后通过近端策略优化（PPO）算法指导基于RL的策略LLM调优。然而，PPO涉及多轮LLM优化，实现起来具有挑战性。为了简化基于RL的调优，提出了直接优化方法，如直接偏好优化（DPO）（Rafailov等人，2023）和SimPO（Meng等人，2024）。虽然这些方法提供了计算效率，但它们存在离策略问题（Pang等人，2024），并且不能始终匹配纯RL方法的性能。替代解决方案包括组相对策略优化（GRPO）（Shao等人，2024），它通过从组分数估计基线来消除对评论家模型的需求，以及RLOO（Ahmadian等人，2024），它引入了一个简化的REINFORCE风格（Williams，1992）优化框架。尽管取得了这些进展，但RL在LLM驱动的搜索引擎交互和推理中的应用仍然很大程度上未被探索。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Demonstration of PPO and GRPO training with the search engine (Search-R1).
items.capZh: 图1：使用搜索引擎（Search-R1）进行PPO和GRPO训练的演示。

items.en: In the following sections, we present the detailed design of Search-R1, covering (1) reinforcement learning with a search engine; (2) text generation with an interleaved multi-turn search engine call; (3) the training template; and (4) reward model design.
items.zh: 在以下部分中，我们介绍Search-R1的详细设计，涵盖（1）使用搜索引擎的强化学习；（2）交错多轮搜索引擎调用的文本生成；（3）训练模板；以及（4）奖励模型设计。

full.sec: 3.1 Reinforcement Learning with a Search Engine
full.secZh: 3.1 基于搜索引擎的强化学习

items.en: We formulate the reinforcement learning framework with a search engine ℛ\mathcal{R} as follows:
items.zh: 我们将使用搜索引擎ℛ\mathcal{R}的强化学习框架公式化如下：

items.en: where πθ\pi_{\theta} is the policy LLM, πref\pi_{\text{ref}} is the reference LLM, rϕr_{\phi} is the reward function and 𝔻KL\mathbb{D}_{\text{KL}} is the KL-divergence. Unlike prior LLM reinforcement learning methods that primarily rely on the policy LLM πθ(⋅∣x)\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x) to generate rollout sequences (Rafailov et al., 2023; Ouyang et al., 2022), our framework explicitly incorporates retrieval interleaved reasoning via πθ(⋅∣x;ℛ)\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x;\mathcal{R}), which can be seen as πθ(⋅∣x)⨂ℛ\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x)\bigotimes\mathcal{R}, where ⨂\bigotimes denotes interleaved retrieval-and-reasoning. This enables more effective decision-making in reasoning-intensive tasks that require external information retrieval. A detailed illustration of the rollout process is provided in Section 3.2.
items.zh: 其中πθ\pi_{\theta}是策略LLM，πref\pi_{\text{ref}}是参考LLM，rϕr_{\phi}是奖励函数，𝔻KL\mathbb{D}_{\text{KL}}是KL散度。与先前主要依赖策略LLM πθ(⋅∣x)\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x)生成rollout序列的LLM强化学习方法不同（Rafailov等人，2023；Ouyang等人，2022），我们的框架通过πθ(⋅∣x;ℛ)\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x;\mathcal{R})显式地纳入检索交错推理，这可以视为πθ(⋅∣x)⨂ℛ\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x)\bigotimes\mathcal{R}，其中⨂\bigotimes表示交错检索与推理。这使得在需要外部信息检索的推理密集型任务中能够进行更有效的决策。rollout过程的详细说明见第3.2节。

items.en: Our approach builds upon two well-established policy gradient RL methods: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) (Schulman et al., 2017) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024; Guo et al., 2025), leveraging their respective advantages to optimize retrieval-augmented reasoning.
items.zh: 我们的方法建立在两种成熟的策略梯度RL方法之上：近端策略优化（PPO）（Schulman等人，2017）和组相对策略优化（GRPO）（Shao等人，2024；Guo等人，2025），利用它们各自的优势来优化检索增强推理。

items.en: In both PPO and GRPO, the token-level loss is computed over the entire rollout sequence. In Search-R1, the rollout sequence consists of both LLM-generated tokens and retrieved tokens from external passages. While optimizing LLM-generated tokens enhances the model’s ability to interact with the search engine and perform reasoning, applying the same optimization to retrieved tokens can lead to unintended learning dynamics. To address this, we introduce loss masking for retrieved tokens, ensuring that the policy gradient objective is computed only over LLM-generated tokens, while excluding retrieved content from the optimization process. This approach stabilizes training while preserving the flexibility of search-augmented generation.
items.zh: 在PPO和GRPO中，令牌级损失是在整个rollout序列上计算的。在Search-R1中，rollout序列由LLM生成的令牌和来自外部段落的检索令牌组成。虽然优化LLM生成的令牌增强了模型与搜索引擎交互和推理的能力，但对检索令牌应用相同的优化可能导致意外的学习动态。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了检索令牌的损失掩码，确保策略梯度目标仅针对LLM生成的令牌计算，而将检索内容排除在优化过程之外。这种方法在保持搜索增强生成灵活性的同时稳定了训练。

items.en: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) (Schulman et al., 2017) is a popular actor-critic reinforcement learning algorithm commonly used for fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) during the RL stage (Ouyang et al., 2022). In our reasoning plus search engine calling scenario, it optimizes LLMs by maximizing the following objective:
items.zh: 近端策略优化（PPO）（Schulman等人，2017）是一种流行的演员-评论家强化学习算法，常用于在RL阶段微调大型语言模型（LLM）（Ouyang等人，2022）。在我们的推理加搜索引擎调用场景中，它通过最大化以下目标来优化LLM：

items.en: where πθ\pi_{\theta} and πref\pi_{\text{ref}} represent the current and reference policy models, respectively. The variable xx denotes input samples drawn from the dataset 𝒟\mathcal{D}, while yy represents the model’s generated outputs interleaved with search engine calling results, sampled from the reference policy πref​(y∣x;ℛ)\pi_{\text{ref}}(y\mid x;\mathcal{R}) and retrieved from the search engine ℛ\mathcal{R}. I​(yt)I(y_{t}) is the token loss masking operation. I​(yt)=1I(y_{t})=1 if yty_{t} is a LLM generated token and I​(yt)=0I(y_{t})=0 if yty_{t} is a retrieved token. The term ϵ\epsilon is a clipping-related hyperparameter introduced in PPO to stabilize training. The advantage estimate AtA_{t} is computed using Generalized Advantage Estimation (GAE) (Schulman et al., 2015), based on future rewards {r≥t}\{r_{\geq t}\} and a learned value function VϕV_{\phi}.
items.zh: 其中πθ\pi_{\theta}和πref\pi_{\text{ref}}分别表示当前策略模型和参考策略模型。变量xx表示从数据集𝒟\mathcal{D}中抽取的输入样本，而yy表示模型生成的输出与搜索引擎调用结果交错，从参考策略πref​(y∣x;ℛ)\pi_{\text{ref}}(y\mid x;\mathcal{R})中采样并从搜索引擎ℛ\mathcal{R}中检索。I​(yt)I(y_{t})是令牌损失掩码操作。如果yty_{t}是LLM生成的令牌，则I​(yt)=1I(y_{t})=1；如果yty_{t}是检索令牌，则I​(yt)=0I(y_{t})=0。项ϵ\epsilon是PPO中引入的用于稳定训练的裁剪相关超参数。优势估计AtA_{t}使用广义优势估计（GAE）（Schulman等人，2015）基于未来奖励{r≥t}\{r_{\geq t}\}和学习到的值函数VϕV_{\phi}计算。

items.en: To improve policy optimization stability and avoid the need for an additional value function approximation, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is introduced in Shao et al. (2024). GRPO differs from Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) by leveraging the average reward of multiple sampled outputs as a baseline rather than relying on a learned value function. Specifically, for each input question xx, GRPO samples a group of responses {y1,y2,…,yG}\{y_{1},y_{2},\dots,y_{G}\} from the reference policy πref\pi_{\text{ref}}. The policy model is then optimized by maximizing the following objective function:
items.zh: 为了提高策略优化稳定性并避免额外的价值函数近似需求，Shao等人（2024）引入了组相对策略优化（GRPO）。GRPO与近端策略优化（PPO）的不同之处在于，它利用多个采样输出的平均奖励作为基线，而不是依赖学习到的价值函数。具体来说，对于每个输入问题xx，GRPO从参考策略πref\pi_{\text{ref}}中采样一组响应{y1,y2,…,yG}\{y_{1},y_{2},\dots,y_{G}\}。然后通过最大化以下目标函数来优化策略模型：

items.en: where ϵ\epsilon and β\beta are hyperparameters, and A^i,t\hat{A}_{i,t} represents the advantage, which is computed based on the relative rewards of outputs within each group. This approach avoids introducing additional complexity in the computation of A^i,t\hat{A}_{i,t}. I​(yi,t)I(y_{i,t}) is the token loss masking operation. I​(yi,t)=1I(y_{i,t})=1 if yi,ty_{i,t} is a LLM generated token and I​(yi,t)=0I(y_{i,t})=0 if yi,ty_{i,t} is a retrieved token. Additionally, instead of incorporating KL divergence as a penalty within the reward function, GRPO regularizes by directly adding the KL divergence between the trained policy and the reference policy to the loss function. The retrieved token masking is also applied when calculating the KL divergence loss 𝔻K​L\mathbb{D}_{KL}.
items.zh: 其中ϵ\epsilon和β\beta是超参数，A^i,t\hat{A}_{i,t}表示优势，基于每组内输出的相对奖励计算。这种方法避免了在A^i,t\hat{A}_{i,t}计算中引入额外复杂性。I​(yi,t)I(y_{i,t})是词元损失掩码操作。如果yi,ty_{i,t}是LLM生成的词元，则I​(yi,t)=1I(y_{i,t})=1；如果yi,ty_{i,t}是检索到的词元，则I​(yi,t)=0I(y_{i,t})=0。此外，GRPO没有将KL散度作为惩罚项纳入奖励函数，而是通过直接将训练策略与参考策略之间的KL散度添加到损失函数中进行正则化。在计算KL散度损失𝔻K​L\mathbb{D}_{KL}时，也应用了检索词元掩码。

full.sec: 3.2 Text Generation with Interleaved Multi-turn Search Engine Call
full.secZh: 3.2 交错多轮搜索引擎调用的文本生成

items.en: In this section, we describe the rollout process for LLM response generation with interleaved multi-turn search engine calls, formulated as: y∼πθ(⋅∣x;ℛ)=πθ(⋅∣x)⨂ℛy\sim\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x;\mathcal{R})=\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x)\bigotimes\mathcal{R}.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了LLM响应生成与交错多轮搜索引擎调用的推出过程，公式化为：y∼πθ(⋅∣x;ℛ)=πθ(⋅∣x)⨂ℛy\sim\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x;\mathcal{R})=\pi_{\theta}(\cdot\mid x)\bigotimes\mathcal{R}。

items.en: Our approach follows an iterative framework where the LLM alternates between text generation and external search engine queries. Specifically, the system instruction guides the LLM to encapsulate its search query between two designated search call tokens, <search> and </search>, whenever an external retrieval is needed. Upon detecting these tokens in the generated sequence, the system extracts the search query, queries the search engine, and retrieves relevant results. The retrieved information is then enclosed within special retrieval tokens, <information> and </information>, and appended to the ongoing rollout sequence, serving as additional context for the next generation step. This process continues iteratively until one of the following conditions is met: (1) the search engine call budget is exhausted, or (2) the model generates a final response, which is enclosed between designated answer tokens, <answer> and </answer>. The complete workflow is outlined in Algorithm 1.
items.zh: 我们的方法遵循一个迭代框架，其中LLM在文本生成和外部搜索引擎查询之间交替进行。具体来说，系统指令引导LLM在需要外部检索时，将其搜索查询封装在两个指定的搜索调用词元<search>和</search>之间。当在生成的序列中检测到这些词元时，系统提取搜索查询，查询搜索引擎，并检索相关结果。检索到的信息随后被封装在特殊的检索词元<information>和</information>内，并附加到正在进行的推出序列中，作为下一步生成的额外上下文。此过程迭代进行，直到满足以下条件之一：（1）搜索引擎调用预算耗尽，或（2）模型生成最终响应，该响应被封装在指定的答案词元<answer>和</answer>之间。完整的工作流程在算法1中概述。

items.en: To train Search-R1, we start by crafting a simple template that directs the initial LLM to follow our predefined instructions. As shown in Table 1, this template structures the model’s output into three parts in an iterative fashion: first, a reasoning process, then a search engine calling function, and finally, the answer. We deliberately limit our constraints to this structural format, avoiding any content-specific biases, such as enforcing reflective reasoning and search engine calling or endorsing specific problem-solving approaches. This ensures that the model’s natural learning dynamics during the RL process remain observable and unbiased.
items.zh: 为了训练Search-R1，我们首先制作一个简单的模板，引导初始LLM遵循我们预定义的指令。如表1所示，该模板以迭代方式将模型的输出结构化为三个部分：首先是推理过程，然后是搜索引擎调用函数，最后是答案。我们有意将约束限制在这种结构格式上，避免任何内容特定的偏见，例如强制进行反思性推理和搜索引擎调用，或支持特定的问题解决方法。这确保了在强化学习过程中模型自然的学习动态保持可观察且无偏。

items.en: The reward function serves as the primary training signal, guiding the optimization process in reinforcement learning. To train Search-R1, we adopt a rule-based reward system that consists solely of final outcome rewards, which assess the correctness of the model’s response. For instance, in factual reasoning tasks, correctness can be evaluated using rule-based criteria such as exact string matching.
items.zh: 奖励函数作为主要的训练信号，指导强化学习中的优化过程。为了训练Search-R1，我们采用基于规则的奖励系统，仅包含最终结果奖励，评估模型响应的正确性。例如，在事实推理任务中，可以使用基于规则的标准（如精确字符串匹配）来评估正确性。

items.en: where apreda_{\text{pred}} is the extracted final answer from response yy and agolda_{\text{gold}} is the ground truth answer. Unlike Guo et al. (2025), we do not incorporate format rewards, as our learned model already demonstrates strong structural adherence. We leave the exploration of more complex format rewards for future work. Furthermore, we deliberately avoid training neural reward models for either outcome or process evaluation, following Guo et al. (2025). This decision is motivated by the susceptibility of neural reward models to reward hacking in large-scale reinforcement learning, as well as the additional computational cost and complexity introduced by retraining these models.
items.zh: 其中apreda_{\text{pred}}是从响应yy中提取的最终答案，agolda_{\text{gold}}是真实答案。与Guo等人（2025）不同，我们没有加入格式奖励，因为我们学习的模型已经表现出强大的结构遵循能力。我们将更复杂格式奖励的探索留给未来工作。此外，我们有意避免训练用于结果或过程评估的神经奖励模型，遵循Guo等人（2025）的做法。这一决定是基于神经奖励模型在大规模强化学习中容易受到奖励黑客攻击，以及重新训练这些模型带来的额外计算成本和复杂性。

items.en: We evaluate Search-R1 on seven benchmark datasets, categorized as follows:
items.zh: 我们在七个基准数据集上评估Search-R1，分类如下：

items.en: General Question Answering: NQ (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019), TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017), and PopQA (Mallen et al., 2022).
items.zh: 通用问答：NQ（Kwiatkowski等人，2019）、TriviaQA（Joshi等人，2017）和PopQA（Mallen等人，2022）。

items.en: Multi-Hop Question Answering: HotpotQA (Yang et al., 2018), 2WikiMultiHopQA (Ho et al., 2020), Musique (Trivedi et al., 2022b), and Bamboogle (Press et al., 2022).
items.zh: 多跳问答：HotpotQA（Yang等人，2018）、2WikiMultiHopQA（Ho等人，2020）、Musique（Trivedi等人，2022b）和Bamboogle（Press等人，2022）。

items.en: These datasets encompass a diverse range of search with reasoning challenges, enabling a comprehensive evaluation of Search-R1 across both single-turn and multi-hop retrieval scenarios.
items.zh: 这些数据集涵盖了多样化的搜索与推理挑战，能够在单跳和多跳检索场景下对Search-R1进行全面评估。

items.en: To evaluate the effectiveness of Search-R1, we compare it against the following baseline methods:
items.zh: 为了评估Search-R1的有效性，我们将其与以下基线方法进行比较：

items.en: Inference without Retrieval: Direct inference and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning (Wei et al., 2022).
items.zh: 无检索推理：直接推理和思维链（CoT）推理（Wei等人，2022）。

items.en: Inference with Retrieval: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) (Lewis et al., 2020), IRCoT (Trivedi et al., 2022a), and Search-o1 (Li et al., 2025).
items.zh: 带检索推理：检索增强生成（RAG）（Lewis等人，2020）、IRCoT（Trivedi等人，2022a）和Search-o1（Li等人，2025）。

items.en: Fine-Tuning-Based Methods: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) (Chung et al., 2024) and reinforcement learning-based fine-tuning without a search engine (R1) (Guo et al., 2025). For R1, we train the LLMs with the RL methods proposed in Guo et al. (2025) with our data to have a fair comparison with Search-R1. It only contains reasoning and answer steps and cannot call a search engine.
items.zh: 基于微调的方法：监督微调（SFT）（Chung等人，2024）和无搜索引擎的基于强化学习的微调（R1）（Guo等人，2025）。对于R1，我们使用Guo等人（2025）提出的强化学习方法在我们的数据上训练LLM，以便与Search-R1进行公平比较。它仅包含推理和答案步骤，不能调用搜索引擎。

items.en: These baselines cover a broad spectrum of retrieval-augmented and fine-tuning approaches, allowing for a comprehensive assessment of Search-R1 in both zero-shot and learned retrieval settings.
items.zh: 这些基线涵盖了广泛的检索增强和微调方法，允许在零样本和学习的检索设置下对Search-R1进行全面评估。

items.en: To make a fair comparison between different methods, we use the same retriever, knowledge corpus, training data and LLMs. More details can be found in Section 4.3.
items.zh: 为了在不同方法之间进行公平比较，我们使用相同的检索器、知识库、训练数据和LLM。更多细节见第4.3节。

items.en: We conduct experiments using three types of models: Qwen-2.5-3B (Base/Instruct) and Qwen-2.5-7B (Base/Instruct) (Yang et al., 2024), as well as Llama-3.2-3B (Base/Instruct) (Dubey et al., 2024). For retrieval, we use the 2018 Wikipedia dump (Karpukhin et al., 2020) as the knowledge source and E5 (Wang et al., 2022) as the retriever. To ensure fair comparison, we follow Lin et al. (2023) and set the number of retrieved passages to three across all retrieval-based methods.
items.zh: 我们使用三种类型的模型进行实验：Qwen-2.5-3B（Base/Instruct）和Qwen-2.5-7B（Base/Instruct）（Yang等人，2024），以及Llama-3.2-3B（Base/Instruct）（Dubey等人，2024）。对于检索，我们使用2018年维基百科转储（Karpukhin等人，2020）作为知识源，E5（Wang等人，2022）作为检索器。为了确保公平比较，我们遵循Lin等人（2023）的做法，将所有基于检索的方法的检索段落数设置为三。

items.en: For training, we merge the training sets of NQ and HotpotQA to form a unified dataset for Search-R1 and other fine-tuning-based baselines. Evaluation is conducted on the test or validation sets of all seven datasets to assess both in-domain and out-of-domain performance. Exact Match (EM) is used as the evaluation metric, following Yu et al. (2024). For inference-style baselines, we use instruct models, as base models fail to follow instructions. For RL tuning methods, experiments are conducted on both base and instruct models.
items.zh: 对于训练，我们将NQ和HotpotQA的训练集合并，形成Search-R1和其他基于微调的基线的统一数据集。在所有七个数据集的测试集或验证集上进行评估，以评估域内和域外性能。使用精确匹配（EM）作为评估指标，遵循Yu等人（2024）的做法。对于推理风格的基线，我们使用指令模型，因为基础模型无法遵循指令。对于强化学习调优方法，实验在基础模型和指令模型上进行。

items.en: For Search-R1 training, in PPO Training, the policy LLM learning rate is set to 1e-6, and value LLM learning rate to 1e-5. The Generalized Advantage Estimation (GAE) parameters are λ=1\lambda=1 and γ=1\gamma=1. In GRPO Training, the policy LLM learning rate is set to 1e-6, with five sampled responses per prompt. We use exact match (EM) to calculate the outcome reward. Unless stated otherwise, PPO is used as the default RL method, and a detailed comparison between PPO and GRPO is provided in Section 5.1.
items.zh: 对于Search-R1训练，在PPO训练中，策略LLM学习率设置为1e-6，价值LLM学习率设置为1e-5。广义优势估计（GAE）参数为λ=1\lambda=1和γ=1\gamma=1。在GRPO训练中，策略LLM学习率设置为1e-6，每个提示采样五个响应。我们使用精确匹配（EM）计算结果奖励。除非另有说明，PPO用作默认的强化学习方法，PPO和GRPO之间的详细比较见第5.1节。

items.en: The main results comparing Search-R1 with baseline methods across the seven datasets are presented in Table 2. From the results, we make the following key observations:
items.zh: 将Search-R1与基线方法在七个数据集上的主要结果比较见表2。从结果中，我们得出以下关键观察：

items.en: Search-R1 consistently outperforms strong baseline methods. We achieve 26%, 21%, and 10% average relative improvement with Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen2.5-3B, and LLaMA3.2-3B, respectively. These gains hold across both in-distribution evaluation (i.e., NQ and HotpotQA) and out-of-distribution evaluation (i.e., TriviaQA, PopQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, Musique, and Bamboogle).
items.zh: Search-R1持续优于强基线方法。在Qwen2.5-7B、Qwen2.5-3B和LLaMA3.2-3B上，我们分别实现了26%、21%和10%的平均相对改进。这些增益在分布内评估（即NQ和HotpotQA）和分布外评估（即TriviaQA、PopQA、2WikiMultiHopQA、Musique和Bamboogle）中均成立。

items.en: Search-R1 surpasses RL-based training for LLM reasoning without retrieval (R1) (Guo et al., 2025). This aligns with expectations, as incorporating search into LLM reasoning provides access to relevant external knowledge, improving overall performance.
items.zh: Search-R1超越了无检索的LLM推理的基于强化学习的训练（R1）（Guo等人，2025）。这与预期一致，因为将搜索纳入LLM推理提供了对外部相关知识的访问，从而提升了整体性能。

items.en: Search-R1 is effective for both base and instruction-tuned models. This demonstrates that DeepSeek-R1-Zero-style RL with outcome-based rewards (Guo et al., 2025) can be successfully applied to reasoning with search, extending beyond its previously established effectiveness in pure reasoning scenarios.
items.zh: Search-R1对基础模型和指令微调模型均有效。这表明，基于结果奖励的DeepSeek-R1-Zero风格强化学习（Guo等人，2025）可以成功应用于带搜索的推理，将其先前在纯推理场景中的有效性扩展到更广的范围。

items.en: Search-R1 generalizes across different base LLMs, including Qwen2.5 and LLaMA3.2. This contrasts with findings in RL for mathematical reasoning, where RL has been observed to work effectively only for certain base LLMs (Zeng et al., 2025). Our results indicate that search-augmented RL is more broadly applicable across model families.
items.zh: Search-R1在不同基础LLM（包括Qwen2.5和LLaMA3.2）上具有泛化能力。这与数学推理中强化学习的研究结果形成对比，后者观察到强化学习仅对某些基础LLM有效（Zeng等人，2025）。我们的结果表明，搜索增强的强化学习在模型家族中具有更广泛的适用性。

full.sec: 5.1 Different RL methods: PPO vs. GRPO

items.en: We evaluate Search-R1 using both PPO and GRPO as the base RL method, conducting experiments on LLaMA3.2-3B and Qwen2.5-3B models. The training dynamics comparison is presented in Figure 2, revealing the following insights:
items.zh: 我们使用PPO和GRPO作为基础强化学习方法评估Search-R1，在LLaMA3.2-3B和Qwen2.5-3B模型上进行实验。训练动态比较如图2所示，揭示了以下见解：

items.en: GRPO converges faster than PPO across all cases. This is because PPO relies on a critic model, which requires several warm-up steps before effective training begins.
items.zh: GRPO在所有情况下比PPO收敛更快。这是因为PPO依赖于评论家模型，该模型需要若干预热步骤才能开始有效训练。

items.en: PPO demonstrates greater training stability. As shown in Figure 2(b), GRPO leads to reward collapse when applied to the LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct model, whereas PPO remains stable across different LLM architectures.
items.zh: PPO表现出更高的训练稳定性。如图2(b)所示，GRPO在应用于LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct模型时导致奖励崩溃，而PPO在不同LLM架构上保持稳定。

items.en: The final training rewards of PPO and GRPO are comparable. Despite differences in convergence speed and stability, both methods achieve similar final reward values, indicating that both are viable for optimizing Search-R1.
items.zh: PPO和GRPO的最终训练奖励相当。尽管在收敛速度和稳定性上存在差异，两种方法都达到了相似的最终奖励值，表明两者均可用于优化Search-R1。

items.en: The evaluation results are presented in Table 3, revealing the following key findings:
items.zh: 评估结果见表3，揭示了以下关键发现：

items.en: GRPO generally outperforms PPO. Across both Qwen2.5-3B and LLaMA3.2-3B, GRPO achieves higher average performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in optimizing retrieval-augmented reasoning.
items.zh: GRPO通常优于PPO。在Qwen2.5-3B和LLaMA3.2-3B上，GRPO均实现了更高的平均性能，证明了其在优化检索增强推理中的有效性。

items.en: Instruct variants perform better than base variants. For Qwen2.5-3B, Search-R1-Instruct (GRPO) achieves the highest overall average score (0.365), outperforming all other configurations. For LLaMA3.2-3B, the best-performing variant is Search-R1-Base (GRPO) with an average score of 0.324, followed closely by Search-R1-Instruct (PPO) at 0.322.
items.zh: 指令变体优于基础变体。对于Qwen2.5-3B，Search-R1-Instruct（GRPO）取得了最高的总体平均得分（0.365），优于所有其他配置。对于LLaMA3.2-3B，性能最佳的变体是Search-R1-Base（GRPO），平均得分为0.324，紧随其后的是Search-R1-Instruct（PPO），得分为0.322。

full.secZh: 5.2 基础模型与指令微调模型

items.en: We analyze the training dynamics of Search-R1 across both base LLMs and instruction-tuned LLMs. Experiments are conducted on three model variants: LLaMA3.2-3B, Qwen2.5-3B, and Qwen2.5-7B. As shown in Figure 3, we observe that instruction-tuned models converge faster and start from a higher initial performance compared to base models. However, the final performance of both model types remains highly similar after training. This finding suggests that while general post-training accelerates learning in reasoning-plus-search scenarios, reinforcement learning can effectively bridge the gap over time, enabling base models to achieve comparable performance.
items.zh: 我们分析了Search-R1在基础LLM和指令微调LLM上的训练动态。实验在三种模型变体上进行：LLaMA3.2-3B、Qwen2.5-3B和Qwen2.5-7B。如图3所示，我们观察到指令微调模型比基础模型收敛更快，且初始性能更高。然而，训练后两种模型类型的最终性能仍然高度相似。这一发现表明，虽然通用后训练加速了推理加搜索场景中的学习，但强化学习可以随时间有效弥合差距，使基础模型达到相当的性能。

items.en: We conduct an experiment using Search-R1 with the LLaMA3.2-3b-base model, training on NQ to analyze the dynamics of training reward and response length over the course of training. The results are presented in Figure 4(a), revealing the following key trends:
items.zh: 我们使用 Search-R1 在 LLaMA3.2-3b-base 模型上进行实验，在 NQ 数据集上训练，以分析训练过程中奖励和响应长度的动态变化。结果如图 4(a) 所示，揭示了以下关键趋势：

items.en: (1) Early Stage (First 100 Steps): The response length sharply decreases, while the training reward exhibits a slight increase. During this phase, the base model learns to eliminate excessive filler words and begins adapting to the task requirements.
items.zh: (1) 早期阶段（前 100 步）：响应长度急剧下降，而训练奖励略有增加。在此阶段，基础模型学会消除多余的填充词，并开始适应任务要求。

items.en: (2) Mid Stage (100–130 Steps): Both response length and training reward increase significantly. At this point, the LLM learns to call the search engine, resulting in longer responses due to retrieved passages. The training reward improves substantially, as the model becomes more effective at leveraging search results.
items.zh: (2) 中期阶段（100-130 步）：响应长度和训练奖励均显著增加。此时，LLM 学会调用搜索引擎，由于检索到的段落，响应变长。训练奖励大幅提升，因为模型更有效地利用了搜索结果。

items.en: (3) Late Stage (After 130 Steps): The response length stabilizes, and the training reward continues to increase slightly. At this stage, the model has learned to use the search engine effectively and focuses on refining its search queries. Given that NQ is a relatively simple task, the response length stabilizes at approximately 500 tokens, indicating convergence.
items.zh: (3) 后期阶段（130 步之后）：响应长度趋于稳定，训练奖励继续略有增加。在此阶段，模型已学会有效使用搜索引擎，并专注于优化其搜索查询。由于 NQ 是一个相对简单的任务，响应长度稳定在大约 500 个 token，表明收敛。

full.sec: 5.4 Study of Retrieved Tokens Loss Masking
full.secZh: 5.4 检索令牌损失掩码研究

items.en: In Section 3.1, we introduced token-level loss masking for retrieved tokens to prevent unintended optimization behaviors. Here, we empirically evaluate its effectiveness by analyzing its impact on training stability and model performance.
items.zh: 在第 3.1 节中，我们引入了针对检索 token 的 token 级损失掩码，以防止意外的优化行为。在此，我们通过分析其对训练稳定性和模型性能的影响，实证评估其有效性。

items.en: We conduct experiments on the LLaMA3.2-3b-base model, comparing training dynamics with and without retrieved token loss masking. As shown in Figure 4(b), applying retrieved token masking results in greater LLM improvements, mitigating unintended optimization effects and ensuring more stable training dynamics.
items.zh: 我们在 LLaMA3.2-3b-base 模型上进行实验，比较了有无检索 token 损失掩码的训练动态。如图 4(b) 所示，应用检索 token 掩码带来了更大的 LLM 改进，减轻了意外的优化效应，并确保了更稳定的训练动态。

items.en: The performance comparison is provided in Table 4, demonstrating that Search-R1 trained with retrieved token loss masking consistently outperforms the variant without masking.
items.zh: 性能比较见表 4，表明使用检索 token 损失掩码训练的 Search-R1 始终优于未使用掩码的变体。

items.en: To gain deeper insights into Search-R1, we conduct a case study using Qwen2.5-7B-Base, comparing its behavior with RL without a search engine (Guo et al., 2025). The results are presented in Table 5, revealing the following key observations:
items.zh: 为了更深入地了解 Search-R1，我们使用 Qwen2.5-7B-Base 进行案例研究，将其与不使用搜索引擎的强化学习（Guo 等人，2025）进行比较。结果见表 5，揭示了以下关键观察：

items.en: Interleaved Reasoning and Retrieval Enhances Problem Analysis: Search-R1 enables the LLM to perform in-depth reasoning with multi-turn retrieval, whereas RL without search relies solely on the model’s internal knowledge. By incorporating retrieved passages, Search-R1 allows the LLM to iteratively refine its reasoning, leading to more informed and accurate responses.
items.zh: 交错推理与检索增强问题分析：Search-R1 使 LLM 能够通过多轮检索进行深入推理，而不使用搜索引擎的强化学习仅依赖模型的内部知识。通过整合检索到的段落，Search-R1 允许 LLM 迭代地优化其推理，从而产生更明智和准确的响应。

items.en: Self-Verification through Iterative Retrieval: We observe that after the second retrieval round, the LLM has already gathered sufficient information to answer the question. However, Search-R1 performs an additional retrieval step to self-verify its conclusion, further reinforcing its confidence in the final response. This phenomenon aligns with findings from LLM reasoning RL without retrieval (Guo et al., 2025), highlighting how reinforcement learning can encourage verification-driven reasoning even in search-augmented settings.
items.zh: 通过迭代检索进行自我验证：我们观察到，在第二轮检索后，LLM 已收集到足够的信息来回答问题。然而，Search-R1 执行额外的检索步骤以自我验证其结论，进一步强化其对最终响应的信心。这一现象与无检索的 LLM 推理强化学习（Guo 等人，2025）的发现一致，突显了强化学习即使在搜索增强设置中也能鼓励验证驱动的推理。

items.en: In this work, we introduced Search-R1, a novel reinforcement learning framework that enables large language models (LLMs) to interleave self-reasoning with real-time search engine interactions. Unlike existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches, which lack flexibility for multi-turn retrieval, or tool-use methods that require large-scale supervised training data, Search-R1 optimizes LLM rollouts through reinforcement learning, allowing autonomous query generation and strategic utilization of retrieved information. Through extensive experiments on seven datasets, we demonstrated that Search-R1 significantly enhances LLMs’ ability to tackle complex reasoning tasks requiring real-time external knowledge. Our analysis also provides key insights into RL training strategies for search-augmented reasoning. Looking ahead, future work can explore expanding Search-R1 to support broader search strategies, including more sophisticated reward mechanisms, dynamic retrieval adjustments based on uncertainty, and integration with diverse information sources beyond web search. It is also promising to investigate its applicability to multimodal reasoning tasks.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了 Search-R1，一种新颖的强化学习框架，使大型语言模型（LLM）能够将自我推理与实时搜索引擎交互交错进行。与缺乏多轮检索灵活性的现有检索增强生成（RAG）方法或需要大规模监督训练数据的工具使用方法不同，Search-R1 通过强化学习优化 LLM 的 rollout，实现自主查询生成和检索信息的策略性利用。通过在七个数据集上的广泛实验，我们证明了 Search-R1 显著增强了 LLM 处理需要实时外部知识的复杂推理任务的能力。我们的分析还为搜索增强推理的强化学习训练策略提供了关键见解。展望未来，未来的工作可以探索扩展 Search-R1 以支持更广泛的搜索策略，包括更复杂的奖励机制、基于不确定性的动态检索调整，以及整合网络搜索以外的多样化信息来源。研究其在多模态推理任务中的适用性也很有前景。

Any opinions, findings, and conclusions or recommendations expressed herein are those of the authors and do not necessarily represent the views, either expressed or implied, of the sponsors or the U.S. Government.
items.zh: 本研究部分得到苹果博士奖学金、美国 DARPA INCAS 计划（编号 HR0011-21-C0165）和 BRIES 计划（编号 HR0011-24-3-0325）、海军研究办公室（合同号 N000142412612）、NSF 资助（编号 IIS-19-56151 和 2402873）、分子制造实验室研究所（NSF 资助号 2019897 下的 AI 研究所计划）以及通过综合发现环境的地理空间理解研究所（I-GUIDE，NSF 资助号 2118329）、思科和智能信息检索中心的支持。本文表达的任何意见、发现、结论或建议均为作者本人观点，不一定代表资助方或美国政府的观点（明示或暗示）。
